Document:
# Skeletons
Skeletons are undead humanoids that have emerged from closets and other forgotten corners of the station. They can speak, move freely, and interact with the station like any humanoid crew member — but they are decidedly [bold]not alive[/bold].
As a skeleton you are [bold]immune to biological hazards[/bold] such as toxins, radiation, and suffocation. You also don't need to eat or drink, which gives you surprising freedom of movement around the station.
You have [bold]no assigned objectives[/bold]. Whether you make friends with the crew, cause minor mischief, or simply wander the halls rattling ominously is entirely up to you.
## Variants
- [bold]Closet Skeleton[/bold] — a standard skeleton in passenger clothing who was apparently waiting inside a closet for the right moment. - [bold]Skeleton Pirate[/bold] — same skeleton, different wardrobe. Arr. - [bold]Skeleton Biker[/bold] — dressed for the open road, despite there being no roads on a space station.
